title: Prominence (disambiguation)
content:
'''''Prominence''''' was the name of two ships:

*'''''[[Prominence (Consular-class)|Prominence]]''''', a [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|''Consular''-class cruiser]]
*'''''[[Prominence (Dreadnaught-class)|Prominence]]''''', a [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]]

{{Disambig}}
